species: T-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia (T-ALL) is a highly aggressive hematologic malignancy...
tissue: Data from GSE13159 demonstrated that USP20 mRNA expression was notably elevated in patients with T-ALL compared to bone marrow samples from non-leukemic and healthy individuals.
cell_type: Western blot analysis revealed high levels of USP20 in peripheral blood T lymphocytes of children with T-ALL...
disease_state: T-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia (T-ALL) is a highly aggressive hematologic malignancy...
sample_source: Bone marrow samples from newly diagnosed pediatric T-ALL patients underwent ChIP assays...
anatomic_site_tumor: H&E staining of mouse liver, spleen, and bone marrow revealed a marked decrease in tumor cells in the USP20 knockdown group...
cell_line: We analyzed publicly available Hi-ChIP data from T-ALL to confirm broad associations between USP20 enhancers and promoters.
